description: Install, update, and manage Android SDK packages, platforms, build tools, and more.

option.name: --install
tip: List packages as arguments after this flag.

option.name: --update
tip: Update all installed packages to the latest version.

option.name: --list
tip: List all installed and available packages.

option.name: --licenses
tip: Show and accept licenses for available packages.

option.name: --version
tip: Print the current version of sdkmanager.

option.name: --sdk_root
tip: Use the specified SDK root instead of the SDK

option.name: --channel
tip: Include packages in channels up to <id>.

option.name: --include_obsolete
tip: With --update, update obsolete packages as well.

option.name: --newer
tip: With --list, show only new and/or updatable packages.

option.name: --no_https
tip: Force all connections to use http rather than https.

option.name: --proxy
tip: Connect via a proxy of the given type.

option.name: --proxy_host
tip: IP or DNS address of the proxy to use.

option.name: --package_file
tip: A text file where each line is a sdk-style path
of a package to install or uninstall.
